units.lean_file_body:
open scoped Polynomial
open MvPolynomial Finset Equiv

namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics
namespace SymmetricFunctions

variable {N : ℕ}

/-- The bijection between partitions of length ≤ N and N-partitions, given by padding with zeros. -/
def equivPartition : {p : Nat.Partition n // Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N} ≃ NPartition N where
  toFun := λ ⟨p, hp⟩ => NPartition.ofPartition p hp
  invFun := λ μ => ⟨NPartition.toPartition μ, by
    have hsize : NPartition.size μ = Multiset.card (NPartition.toPartition μ).parts := rfl
    have hcard : Multiset.card (NPartition.toPartition μ).parts ≤ N := by
      have : (NPartition.toPartition μ).parts = (Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts).filter (· ≠ 0) := rfl
      calc
        Multiset.card ((Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts).filter (· ≠ 0)) ≤ Multiset.card (Finset.univ.val.map μ.parts) := Multiset.card_filter_le _ _
        _ = Finset.card (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin N)) := by simp
        _ = N := by simp
    exact hcard⟩
  left_inv := by
    intro ⟨p, hp⟩
    ext1
    dsimp [NPartition.toPartition, NPartition.ofPartition]
    sorry
  right_inv := by
    intro μ
    ext1 i
    dsimp [NPartition.ofPartition, NPartition.toPartition]
    sorry

end SymmetricFunctions
end AlgebraicCombinatorics
notes: The proof of left_inv and right_inv is not provided; the definitions ofPartition and toPartition are taken from local_file_predecessor_declarations but their full correctness proof requires additional lemmas about sorting and filtering that are not fully available in the visible context. The statement is structurally correct but the proofs are incomplete.
